projects.title: CodeFlow:Collaborative Code Editor
projects.description: A next-generation collaborative code editor. Experience seamless pair programming with real-time sync, built-in terminal, and instant chat
projects.longDescription: Architected and Deployed a real-time collaborative code editor using Liveblocks for shared state, presence,and multi-user synchronization.Integrated MonacoEditor to deliver an IDE like in-browser coding experience with live updates.Implemented multi-language code execution using the Judge0 API, enabling secure and isolated code runs.Designed a WebSocket-driven real-time system handling 10–15 concurrent users per room with 200ms update latency, secured using JWT authentication and MongoDB-backed persistence.

projects.title: Payflow
projects.description: Developed a full-stack inventory management platform using React, Node.js, Express, and MongoDB to learn about transactions in MongoDB
projects.longDescription: PayFlow is a full-stack digital wallet application that allows users to send money, track transactions, and manage their balance in real time. It includes features like secure payments, transaction history, and user profile management, all deployed on the cloud using Azure with CI/CD for scalability and reliability.

projects.title: StockMaster-Inventory Management System
projects.description: Developed a full-stack inventory management platform using React, Node.js, Express, and MongoDB to manage products, warehouses, and stock movements with real-time tracking, role-based authentication, and automated inventory updates.
projects.longDescription: Built a full-stack inventory management system to digitize warehouse operations and replace manual stock tracking. The platform supports product management, incoming receipts, delivery orders, internal stock transfers, and stock adjustments, with automatic inventory updates through a centralized stock ledger. Implemented JWT-based authentication, role-based access control, and OTP password recovery for secure user management. Designed a real-time dashboard displaying key warehouse metrics such as total stock, low-inventory alerts, and pending operations. Developed a responsive frontend using React, TailwindCSS, and Framer Motion, and built RESTful APIs with Node.js, Express, and MongoDB for scalable backend operations.

projects.title: Secondbrain
projects.description: Organize, store, and access your knowledge effortlessly with a system that grows with you.
projects.longDescription: Built features to create, organize, and share curated link collections (Brains), enabling collaborative knowledge management and smooth user experience.Developed a backend with RESTful APIs, JWT authentication and Cloudinary integration , using a modular NodeJs + Express architecture for high performance and maintainability.

projects.title: SnipIt-URL Shortener
projects.description: A URL shortener that allows you to shorten your URLs and track their analytics.
projects.longDescription: Engineered a URL shortener that allows you to shorten your URLs and track their analytics.

projects.title: DrawByte
projects.longDescription: • Engineered a real-time collaborative whiteboard application to facilitate virtual drawing among users.Leveraged WebSockets and Canvas API to enable seamless and real-time live updates, providing a smooth sketching experience.

description: Worked on designing and implementing a full-stack mail integration service for Optiwise using the Nylas API.
Supports inbox/sent views, email rendering, and OAuth-based authentication for Gmail and Outlook.
Enhanced the user experience by designing guided onboarding flows with React Joyride, resulting in 60% positive feedback from new users regarding ease of use.
Led the execution of 10+ large-scale cultural events, including fests and competitions, ensuring seamless delivery through strategic planning and team collaboration.
Was responsible for managing the cultural events including Oculus - the 3days flagship fest of our college.

hobbies: 'Hobbies Section' one section which I love writing about and reading . I dont quiet have very generic hobbies but I have listed few of them here. I love reading, like actually love reading so its correct that.... the whole theme of this portfolio? very intentional. Books are my comfort and therapy. Its the closest I get to meditation, just me, my book, and zero notifications. Instant peace mode. i’m also dangerously attached to tea.I don’t “like” tea. I exist because of tea. I genuinely think I could drown in tea and be okay with it ☕ . I love walking in nature and touching the grass ,sleeping in and quiet evenings. My “me time” matters. It helps me recharge so I can create better, think clearer, and just exist peacefully.

contact.message: I'm always open to discussing new projects, creative ideas or opportunities to be part of your visions.
